sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects LockerGoga ransomware activity via specific command line.

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Suspicious Manipulation Of Default Accounts Via Net.EXE
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects suspicious manipulations of default accounts such as 'administrator' and 'guest'. For example 'enable' or 'disable' accounts or change the password...etc

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Credential Manager Access By Uncommon Applications
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description:
Detects suspicious processes based on name and location that access the windows credential manager and vault.
Which can be a sign of credential stealing. Example case would be usage of mimikatz "dpapi::cred" function
Local accounts, System Owner/User discovery using operating systems utilities
